source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260213 태국 MD Healthcard Co., Ltd/251209 보완서류/2.1 [Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector] DoC, LoA/4 Safety Declaration 251209.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Safety declaration for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW submitted to the Thai Food and Drug Administration.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports medical device registration by declaring no global safety issues, deaths, serious health deterioration, or open field safety corrective actions at submission.
keyPoints: Applicant H&abyz Co., Ltd. declares no safety issues globally when the devices are used as intended in the last one year from 09 December 2025.
The declaration lists the product name as Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
The declaration lists model names A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
The applicant acknowledges false declarations may be an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2008), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562), and other applicable laws.
Non-compliance with registration conditions issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration may result in suspension or cancellation of medical device registration.

evidence.claim: H&abyz Co., Ltd. is the applicant for registration of the stated medical devices.
evidence.evidenceText: I, H&abyz Co., Ltd., the applicant for registration of the medical device(s) stated below

evidence.claim: The applicant declares there are no global safety issues associated with intended use in the last one year from 09 December 2025.
evidence.evidenceText: hereby declare that there are no safety issues globally associated with the use of the medical device(s) when used as intended by the Product Owner, in the last one year from 09 December 2025.

evidence.claim: The declaration states no reported deaths.
The declaration states no reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person.
evidence.evidenceText: ( √) No reported serious deterioration in the state of health1 of any person;
evidence.pageTarget: Serious Deterioration In The State Of Health

evidence.claim: False declarations are stated to be an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2008), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562), and other applicable laws.

evidence.evidenceText: any non-compliance with any registration condition issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration in relation to medical devices registered with the Medical Device Control Division may result in the suspension or cancellation of the medical devices registration.
